title: Question: Verilator compilation issues with certain 3rd party verilog IP
body:
---


Author Name: **Kent Arnold**
Original Redmine Message: 1040 from https://www.veripool.org



---

This IP is auto-generated RTL, that sprinkles "parameter" definitions in and about the other RTL constructs, i.e. 

module EXAMPLE ();

parameter X = IDLE;

<assign statements, process blocks>

parameter Y = 4'hB;

endmodule

When attempting to verilate this module, I get an error message something like this:
%Error: EXAMPLE.v:6: Duplicate declaration of variable: X
%Error: EXAMPLE.v:2: ...Location of original declaration

Running verilator-3.840. We would rather not have to go down the path of hacking 3rd party IP verilog - is there a work-around?

Thanks.
Kent Arnold
